item.title: Telegram bot - Ramsay123
item.description: This project can be found on Github and Devpost. Background As college students, eating out may not always be the viable option to enjoy a scrumptious yet healthy and affordable meal. This bot aims to introduce and recommend dishes tailored to user’s dietary preference, so that users can discover new food to prepare in their own kitchen, or head to the nearest restaurants and expand their palate. Introduction Ramsay123 is a telegram bot, which interacts with users via customized keyboards.

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hello! I am an aspiring software developer, university student studying computer science and economics, and an enthusiastic learner in information security and natural sciences. I enjoy learning new technology and use my expertise to solve problems. Beyond academics, I am also interested in trading despite that I am still a newbie in the field. I spent most of my free time playing basketball, skating and reading. My Life Story Early Days (well not that early) I was born in China and has spent the first 15 years of my life in Tianjin, a beautiful international port city on the east coast of China.

item.title: Why blog?
item.description: It has been one year since I started university and my programming journey. Programming is super enjoyable for me, and I wished I could have started learning programming earlier. Despite being enjoyable, there have also been many hair-pulling moments when I was learning how to program at the beginning. How to implement a BFS, how to write code in functional style, how to quit vim… Believe me, all of these seem easy but they are indeed challenging and frustrating for newbies.

item.title: Home
item.description: Year 2 CS Undergraduate Student @ National University of Singapore. Welcome to my site! Here are some of my blogs:
